default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance updates, and workflow improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/hyjiFd2PXmLdRKVYkgxw-61LXC7G691F?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [75% increase in clicks and significant growth in impressions over the past week](https://fathom.video/share/hyjiFd2PXmLdRKVYkgxw-61LXC7G691F?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [Shifting focus to refreshing existing content and creating new integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/hyjiFd2PXmLdRKVYkgxw-61LXC7G691F?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Improving content quality with V2 workflow, including external links and more comprehensive coverage](https://fathom.video/share/hyjiFd2PXmLdRKVYkgxw-61LXC7G691F?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Collaborating on topic selection in Airtable, prioritizing top-of-funnel content over competitor comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/hyjiFd2PXmLdRKVYkgxw-61LXC7G691F?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)

## Topics

### Performance Update

  - [75% increase in clicks and substantial growth in impressions](https://fathom.video/share/hyjiFd2PXmLdRKVYkgxw-61LXC7G691F?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [28 total articles launched, 21 indexed so far](https://fathom.video/share/hyjiFd2PXmLdRKVYkgxw-61LXC7G691F?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
  - [Weekly updates on clicks, impressions, and CTR available in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/hyjiFd2PXmLdRKVYkgxw-61LXC7G691F?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)

### Content Strategy Shift

  - [Focus on refreshing existing content and creating new integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/hyjiFd2PXmLdRKVYkgxw-61LXC7G691F?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [10 most important integration pages identified for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/hyjiFd2PXmLdRKVYkgxw-61LXC7G691F?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [28 more topics in the content strategy, including previously approved ones](https://fathom.video/share/hyjiFd2PXmLdRKVYkgxw-61LXC7G691F?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [V2 workflow being used for new content, with ongoing improvements](https://fathom.video/share/hyjiFd2PXmLdRKVYkgxw-61LXC7G691F?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)

### Integration Pages

  - [Victor suggested focusing on creating new integration pages rather than refreshing existing high-traffic ones](https://fathom.video/share/hyjiFd2PXmLdRKVYkgxw-61LXC7G691F?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Categorization by headless commerce, marketing automation, analytics, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/hyjiFd2PXmLdRKVYkgxw-61LXC7G691F?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
  - [Aim to create top 10 integration pages for each category that don't currently exist](https://fathom.video/share/hyjiFd2PXmLdRKVYkgxw-61LXC7G691F?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)

### Topic Selection

  - [Moving away from competitor comparisons (e.g., alternatives to Storyblock, Sanity)](https://fathom.video/share/hyjiFd2PXmLdRKVYkgxw-61LXC7G691F?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [Emphasis on top-of-funnel topics like "multilingual SEO best practices"](https://fathom.video/share/hyjiFd2PXmLdRKVYkgxw-61LXC7G691F?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Paul suggested creating content for specific user groups: Strapi for developers, marketers, agencies, solopreneurs](https://fathom.video/share/hyjiFd2PXmLdRKVYkgxw-61LXC7G691F?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)

### Content Quality Improvements

  - [Theodore noted improvements in external links, more comprehensive coverage, and better content structure](https://fathom.video/share/hyjiFd2PXmLdRKVYkgxw-61LXC7G691F?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [Reduced editing time for Theo due to quality improvements](https://fathom.video/share/hyjiFd2PXmLdRKVYkgxw-61LXC7G691F?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [Ongoing tweaks including fact-checking workflow and custom source selection](https://fathom.video/share/hyjiFd2PXmLdRKVYkgxw-61LXC7G691F?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Tagging and Metadata

  - [Discussion on improving automated tagging for articles](https://fathom.video/share/hyjiFd2PXmLdRKVYkgxw-61LXC7G691F?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
  - [Clarification on using "tags2" component instead of "tags1" in the content manager](https://fathom.video/share/hyjiFd2PXmLdRKVYkgxw-61LXC7G691F?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
  - [Need to follow best practices document for tag selection and creation](https://fathom.video/share/hyjiFd2PXmLdRKVYkgxw-61LXC7G691F?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andrej to send a batch of new topic ideas by Friday morning for approval](https://fathom.video/share/hyjiFd2PXmLdRKVYkgxw-61LXC7G691F?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
  - [Team to collaborate on topic selection and prioritization in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/hyjiFd2PXmLdRKVYkgxw-61LXC7G691F?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [Focus on three-pronged approach: integration pages, content refreshes, and new articles](https://fathom.video/share/hyjiFd2PXmLdRKVYkgxw-61LXC7G691F?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Investigate automating tag creation process using API](https://fathom.video/share/hyjiFd2PXmLdRKVYkgxw-61LXC7G691F?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Continue refining V2 workflow with fact-checking and custom source selection](https://fathom.video/share/hyjiFd2PXmLdRKVYkgxw-61LXC7G691F?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

Start working on new integration pages per Notion doc guidance
Send batch of new topics by Friday morning for team review
Review & provide feedback on new content ideas in Airtable
Review & provide feedback on new content ideas in Airtable
Review & provide feedback on new content ideas in Airtable
Focus on integration pages & refreshes this week; add new topic buckets to Airtable
Look into automating tag creation in CMS using API & best practices doc
